pages.text:
THE HASHEMITE KINGDOM

OF JORDAN

Ministry of Agriculture (Veterinary Department)

No. 11/2/27/1/2878

Date 8.10.1961

وزارة الزراعة ( مديرية البيطرة )

ay

• الارونة ا

: 14001:

الرقم التاريخ.

!

6°C.

Dear Dr. Vittoz

In reference to your letter No. I. 1458 dated 27th.

March 1961, I am pleased to inform you that His Excellency

The Jordan Minister of Foreign Affairs had sent you an official letter No. 3/16/977 dated 26.7.1961, in the (Arabic language, ) informing the Director General of the Office

International De Epizooties, Paris, that the Government of the H.X. of Jordan has decided to participate in the Organisation but unfortunately, the letter in Question has not yet been answered. A reminder was sent to you by the said Ministry under No. 3/16/1300 dated 4.10.1961 but no reply was received.

I shall be much grateful to be favoured with an early answer so as to enable me arrange remittance of the subscription.

With kindest regards,

Yours truly

Kastlaher

Kamal - El- Taher

Director General

Veterinary Department

Amman - Jordan

Dr. R. Vittoz

Director, O.I.E.

Office International De

Epizooties, 12, Rue De Prony

PARIS XVII
